name: 11_magnitude_fails_mc_met_resets
description: MC sanity met (model says we're losing) but magnitude fails (price hasn't dropped far enough yet). Resets count -- magnitude is a hard floor.
derivation: Guard passes. Magnitude: -1.05 <= -1.0 - 0.10 = -1.10 is FALSE (just above floor). MC: 30.0 < 60.0 is TRUE. Combined: False AND True = False. Reset branch; new_count = 0; hit = False. Canonical 'magnitude buffer protects against MC noise' case.
